name: Chocolate Cream Cake ,Wheat Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and flour a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Melt butter and chocolate chips in a double boiler.
3. Separate the eggs.
4. Beat egg yolks until thick, slowly add half cup sugar.
5. Stir in nuts, Frangelico, vanilla, and melted chocolate.
6. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until they form soft peaks.
7. Slowly add half cup sugar, beat until stiff.
8. Fold one-fourth of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture; fold all the chocolate mixture into the whites.
9. Pour into springform pan and bake in a pre-heated 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
10. Lower heat to 275°F, bake for another 30 minutes.
11. Turn off the heat, let cake stand in oven with door slightly open for 30 minutes.
12. Remove cake from pan and place on a platter.
13. Beat cream until soft peaks form. Slowly add powdered sugar and Frangelico.
14. Spread cream evenly over top of cake.
15. Sprinkle with chocolate curls made from semi-sweet chocolate.
16. Refrigerate for 6-8 hours. Let sit at room temperature for 30-40 minutes before serving.
